Registry / Terms / additional device

additional device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01625 · 11 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 10 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102009OIML R 80-1:2009
#02243
2.4
part or device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure Examples of additional devices: correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement
pending
20102007OIML R 117-1:2007
#01528
T.a.2
part or device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure Main additional devices are: correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement
pending
20102007OIML R 139:2007
#01994
T.1.6
part or device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement Main additional devices are: - filter; - device used for the transfer point; - anti-swirl device; - branches or bypasses; - valves, hoses, and in general, all the gaseous piping.
pending
20102007OIML R 140:2007
#02046
T.1.6
element or device, other than ancillary, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement. Examples of additional devices are: - filter; - flow conditioning device; - branch or by-pass line; - valves; - pressure reduction devices located upstream or downstream of the meter; - sampling systems; - piping.
pending
20101998OIML R 125:1998
#01625
T.9.2
a device other than an ancillary device, required to ensure the correct metrological performance of the system, e.g. valves allowing verification of pressure transducers, atmospheric pressure balancing pipes between pressure transducers, etc.
pending
202X2019OIML R117-1:2019
#02841
T.a.2
part or device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement
pending
202X2018OIML R139-1:2018
#02727
3.2.7
part or a device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement
pending
202X2017OIML R080-2:2017
#02840
2
Part or device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement. Examples of additional devices: manifold; sampling device; ;gas indicator; sight glass; filter, pump; gas elimination device; device used for the transfer point; anti-swirl device; branches or bypasses; valves, hoses.
pending
202X2009OIML R 80-1:2009
#02243-R080-1
2.4
part or device, other than an ancillary device, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement Examples of additional devices: manifold; sampling device; gas indicator; sight glass; filter, pump; gas elimination device; device used for the transfer point; anti-swirl device; branches or bypasses; valves, hoses.
pending
202X2007OIML R 140:2007
#02046
T.1.6
element or device, other than ancillary, required to ensure correct measurement or intended to facilitate the measuring operations, or which could in any way affect the measurement. Examples of additional devices are: filter; flow conditioning device; branch or by-pass line; valves; pressure reduction devices located upstream or downstream of the meter; sampling systems; piping.
pending
202X1998OIML R 125:1998
#01625
T.9.2
a device other than an ancillary device, required to ensure the correct metrological performance of the system, e.g. valves allowing verification of pressure transducers, atmospheric pressure balancing pipes between pressure transducers, etc.
